name: Fiz and the Rainbow Planet
short_description: The unique little dragons run around with three buttons. A pixel art style 2.5D action game that goes beyond dimention! Fiz and the Rainbow Planet" is a 2.5D dot-picture action game in which players switch characters in a resourceful manner as they progress.
detailed_description:
Control little dragons and explore a world full of gimmicks!

Fiz and the Rainbow Planet" is a 2.5D dot-picture action game in which players switch characters in a resourceful manner as they progress. In the work's "3D Protectorate Area" you can enjoy the distinctive game experience of progressing through a three-dimensional space while maintaining 2D graphics and controls.

~Story~
Somewhere in the universe is the planet Longa. One day, Fiz, a child dragon living on this planet, had a dream.
It was a terrifying nightmare in which the world turned black and white and all living creatures stopped moving.
When Fiz woke up, Taonga, the omniscient and omnipotent dragon who suddenly appeared in front of him, told him that the dream could happen in the future.
He also said that in order to change the future, Fiz, Taonga, and a total of seven other dragons must join forces to protect the orbs scattered throughout the world.
Hearing this, Fiz makes up his mind and sets off on an adventure to find his friends in order to protect the world. ......
